netapp.azure.azure_rm_netapp_account.description: Create and delete NetApp Azure account. Provide the Resource group name for the NetApp account to be created.

name.description: The name of the NetApp account.

active_directories.description: list of active directory dictionaries. The list is currently limited to a single active directory (ANF or Azure limit of one AD per subscription).

state.description: State C(present) will check that the NetApp account exists with the requested configuration. State C(absent) will delete the NetApp account.

debug.description: output details about current account if it exists.

netapp.azure.azure_rm_netapp_capacity_po.short_description: Manage NetApp Azure Files capacity pool
netapp.azure.azure_rm_netapp_capacity_po.description: Create and delete NetApp Azure capacity pool. Provide the Resource group name for the capacity pool to be created. Resize NetApp Azure capacity pool

name.description: The name of the capacity pool.

account_name.description: The name of the NetApp account.

size.description: Provisioned size of the pool (in chunks). Allowed values are in 4TiB chunks. Provide number to be multiplied to 4TiB. Required for create.

service_level.description: The service level of the file system. Required for create.

state.description: State C(present) will check that the capacity pool exists with the requested configuration. State C(absent) will delete the capacity pool.

netapp.azure.azure_rm_netapp_snapshot.description: Create and delete NetApp Azure Snapshot.

pool_name.description: The name of the capacity pool.

account_name.description: The name of the NetApp account.

state.description: State C(present) will check that the snapshot exists with the requested configuration. State C(absent) will delete the snapshot.

netapp.azure.azure_rm_netapp_volume.description: Create and delete NetApp Azure volume.

file_path.description: A unique file path for the volume. Used when creating mount targets.

pool_name.description: The name of the capacity pool.

account_name.description: The name of the NetApp account.

subnet_name.description: Azure resource name for a delegated subnet. Must have the delegation Microsoft.NetApp/volumes. Provide name of the subnet ID. Required for create.

virtual_network.description: The name of the virtual network required for the subnet to create a volume. Required for create.

service_level.description: The service level of the file system. default is Premium.

vnet_resource_group_for_subnet.description: Only required if virtual_network to be used is of different resource_group. Name of the resource group for virtual_network and subnet_name to be used.

size.description: Provisioned size of the volume (in GiB). Minimum size is 100 GiB. Upper limit is 100TiB default is 100GiB.

protocol_types.description: Protocol types - NFSv3, NFSv4.1, CIFS (for SMB).

state.description: State C(present) will check that the volume exists with the requested configuration. State C(absent) will delete the volume.

feature_flags.description: Enable or disable a new feature. This can be used to enable an experimental feature or disable a new feature that breaks backward compatibility. Supported keys and values are subject to change without notice.  Unknown keys are ignored.
